title: Opendoor iBuying Pioneer Navigates Real Estate Market Shifts
text: Opendoor Technologies Stock: iBuying Pioneer Navigates Real Estate Shifts. Opendoor was the first to introduce the iBuyer model to the U.S. residential real estate market and has remained the largest iBuyer ever since. Within the iBuyer segment, Opendoor contributed 67% of the total volume as of 2022. However, market share in iBuying remains small relative to total U.S. home sales, estimated under 1%, leaving room for penetration and market growth. Opendoor competes with peers like Zillow, Offerpad, and Redfin, all vying to digitize real estate. The company's first-mover advantage in iBuying provides brand recognition, but competitors challenge with varied models such as co-buying or brokerage hybrids. Recent earnings results have highlighted meaningful improvement in the performance of newer home acquisition cohorts.
